title: Search Loop
brief: Replace repeated markers using search and repeat jumps.
objectives: Replace every FIXME token with DONE in notes.md.
hints: Quick path: run :%s/FIXME/DONE/g then press Enter.
Manual path: /FIXME, then cgnDONE, press Esc, and repeat with n.
primary_path: Replace all markers in one step: `:%s/FIXME/DONE/g`.
fallback_path: Use `/FIXME` then `cgnDONE` and `n` repeatedly until done.
Run `./stage check` to confirm zero `FIXME` remain.
why_path: Global substitution is the fastest and safest fit for repeated identical tokens across the whole file.
pro_move: cgn + . can apply the same change rapidly across matches.
